DAMIEN: Celine was the one in charge of: DAMIEN: Celine was the one in charge of performing this ritual every year, annually.
But when she completed the ritual, she w: But when she completed the ritual, she was attacked.
The person who attacked her was Madame X: The person who attacked her was Madame X. This was Madame X's first known appearance.
The battle between them ended in a draw,: The battle between them ended in a draw, but Madame X was able to get away with the Dark Stone.
When mother appeared in Alamissa, she wa: When mother appeared in Alamissa, she was near death...
That image of her was burned into my mem: That image of her was burned into my memory.
Her eyes were empty, she clutched the Li: Her eyes were empty, she clutched the Light Stone towards her chest, and for a while she didn't let go.
When her stare grew to its emptiest, she: When her stare grew to its emptiest, she collapsed.
ALEXANDRA: As a result of her wounds, sh: ALEXANDRA: As a result of her wounds, she lost the use of her left arm, and right leg.
Using Black Shards, we were able to crea: Using Black Shards, we were able to create prosthetics for her, but...
Naturally, she wasn't as strong as she o: Naturally, she wasn't as strong as she once was.
She had to think of a plan, and quickly.
Aevium was still in recovery after the C: Aevium was still in recovery after the Calamity. The population was low, and as such, there weren't many powerful trainers around.
Celine had heard that a region far off h: Celine had heard that a region far off had implemented a League in which its challenge was an appealing feature.
It brought trainers from far away, and i: It brought trainers from far away, and it even budded new talent within its lands.
She knew that if the same thing took pla: She knew that if the same thing took place here, she could protect the region from the threat that was Madame X.
As a result, Celine decided that she her: As a result, Celine decided that she herself would recreate this same scenario in Aevium, and so she did.
DAMIEN: Celine grew up in rough conditio: DAMIEN: Celine grew up in rough conditions, at this point she was already well trained, and even had natural skill.
Because of her strength she made a name: Because of her strength she made a name for herself. Celine, The Silent Sweeper.
She'd take down teams of 6 with only one: She'd take down teams of 6 with only one Pokémon within minutes.
She gained a following, and with this, s: She gained a following, and with this, she connected herself with influential people within the Region.
Even if they weren't trainers themselves: Even if they weren't trainers themselves, she explained the situation, and offered to train whoever needed it.
Thus the first half of the Elite 8 forme: Thus the first half of the Elite 8 formed.
KANON: Once that was complete, she recru: KANON: Once that was complete, she recruited 3 of the top students at Axis High to become her assistants and scouts.
They gathered hundreds of applicants, an: They gathered hundreds of applicants, and over the time of three weeks, gathered 18 potential Gym Leaders.
KANON: Her plan was working! News spread: KANON: Her plan was working! News spread of the League all over the world!
Trainers from each corner began flocking: Trainers from each corner began flocking. Talent within the region appeared too. Everything was going as planned.
But Celine became paranoid. If Madame X: But Celine became paranoid. If Madame X attacked the Elite 4 and herself, and won, the league itself would crumble.
In order to prevent this, she built the: In order to prevent this, she built the Pokémon League in secret with the original Elite 4.
When it was finished, she recruited four: When it was finished, she recruited four more Elite members and designated them as Gatekeepers.
Only once all four gatekeepers are defea: Only once all four gatekeepers are defeated, would the League show itself.
